title.en: The Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said ...

content.en:
meeting.

The Heavenly Calamity Tribulation Ancestor ordered: "Heavenly Ruins, according to the current progress, if you want to completely transform the Wind Ancient River into the Eternal Tribulation Domain, I am afraid that you will not be able to do it, so I order you to immediately enter the Wind Ancient River and take away the Innate Eternal Life when the Innate Eternal Life is about to be born." In that case, no one will be able to stop you, and once you bring the Innate Eternal Life here, it will be difficult for even the Eternal Realm to snatch the Innate Eternal Life from us. "

"Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, I am a half-step Eternal Realm, and I can't enter the Wind Ancient River!"

The Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said in a deep voice.

"No, you can enter, you know!" said the Scourge Ancestor.

Suddenly.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor realized what the Heavenly Tribulation Ancestor's words meant.

"Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, you want me to behead my cultivation?"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor was furious.

"That's good!" "It's very difficult for you to cultivate yourself, and it's not a bad thing to cut off your cultivation, and after you cut off your cultivation, you can still continue to cultivate, and it won't be long before you can continue to ascend to the half-step Eternal Realm." "

"But if you cut off your cultivation, your own potential and foundation will also be cut off, and I won't be able to advance an inch at all in the future!" said the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor angrily.

"It's for the sake of the race!"

The Scourge Tribulation Ancestor said.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor is not reconciled, although his hope of continuing to progress is very low, but he is also the third Tribulation Ancestor of the Eternal Tribulation Clan!

But he didn't dare to resist the Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, because the Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor was really powerful, if it weren't for the Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, the Eternal Tribulation Clan would have been wiped out long ago.

"Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, I will cut myself down and cultivate to enter the Wind Ancient River!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor reluctantly agreed.

That's right, it's all about the community.

An innate eternal life, if used properly, is enough to bring huge benefits to the Eternal Tribulation Ancestor, and can even make the Eternal Tribulation Clan completely take off and rise, and no longer shrink into the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain.

Even in the future, the Eternal Tribulation Clan will dare to appear openly in the Source Sea.

Time lapses –

On this day, Ye Tian obviously sensed the changes in the outside world.

Although he was sealed, he was still able to sense the situation in the outside world.

At this time, the vision of the birth of innate eternal life has begun to emerge.

"It's time to prepare!"

Ye Tian immediately annihilated this copy body of his own.

He didn't want to continue to delay time, in case he missed the opportunity and let the Eternal Tribulation take away the Innate Eternal Life in an instant, he would not have time to run into the Innate Eternal Life.

After all, he is now sealed, and there is no way to copy the innate eternal life, so he can only re-enter.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian sped up time, and soon condensed a copy body, and let the copy body carry that Eternal Realm powerful finger, after all, once he approached the innate eternal life, I was afraid that he would fight with the Eternal Tribulation Clan.

No one knows what forces the Eternal Tribulation will send at the last minute, so they must go there in the strongest possible state.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Fenggu River, entered it, and shuttled to the vicinity of the birthplace of the innate eternal life at the fastest speed.

At this time, the vision here is already expanding, and I am afraid that it will not be long before the entire Fenggu River will be covered by the vision.

Rumble!!!!!

The phantom of a billion-billion-s-tall unicorn creature roared in the void, its voice fluctuating and shaking the sky.

This is the illusion of vision.

Soon.

Several nearby Supreme Beings sensed it and immediately notified them to go out.

Therefore, countless Supreme Beings knew that innate eternal life was born here, and rushed here.

At the same time, the dense army of the Eternal Tribulation was stationed here.

After all, you can't hide it, so you won't hide it.

Supreme Eternal Tribulation.

Under the order of the Heavenly Tribulation Ancestor, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor began to cut himself off.

In the void, blades of eternal rules slashed into his body from nothingness.

A scream came out of the mouth of the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor, and his aura continued to decrease.

Nine Realms!

Yaerealm!

Sevenfold Realm!

It was only when it was lowered to the peak of the Sixfold Realm that the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor stopped.

Only the peak of the Sixfold Realm could enter the Wind Ancient River, so it was enough to reduce the self-cultivation to this level.

At this time, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor took advantage of a precious healing treasure to quickly recover from the injuries caused by his self-slashing cultivation.

"Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor, although your cultivation has been reduced to the peak of the Sixfold Realm, but after all, you have mastered an eternal technique, and your mastery of the rules of eternity is far beyond that of other Sixfold Realms, and your eternal body has reached the consummation realm, and your body is extremely powerful, enough to exert a strength comparable to the peak of the Eightfold Realm, and with the help of the treasures in the clan, it is enough to increase your strength to the Ninefold Realm, in the Wind Ancient River, you are an invincible existence, I hope you will not let the Eternal Tribulation Clan down. The Ancestor of the Natural Calamity said.

"Don't worry, I will definitely bring back the Innate Eternal Life!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor promised, but he was not in a very good mood, so he dealt with it casually, and prepared to go to the Fenggu River, not wanting to talk to the Heavenly Tribulation Ancestor here.

Soon, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor descended on the Fenggu River.

-----------------------

The birthplace of innate eternal life.

Countless Supreme Beings poured in here, saw the vision, and their hearts were extremely excited.

This is an innate eternal life, and its value is unimaginable.

Moreover, at this time, the outside world has offered a sky-high price for the half-step Eternal Realm, if he obtains the innate eternal life, even if he can't keep it, but if he gives the half-step Eternal Realm, he can also obtain enough resources to cultivate to the Ninefold Realm.

"Kill the Eternal Tribulation!"

The army of the Supreme and the army of the Eternal Tribulation have been fighting.

Abrupt.

A gray palm emerged from the void, and with a single blow, the dense Supreme One was shattered.

The force of this blow is terrifying!

"No !!"

A supreme being was terrified in his heart, and his body was crushed to pieces under a terrifying force.

At this time, the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor appeared.

The Supreme One recognized the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor, and immediately showed a look of disbelief.

"It's the third ancestor of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor, how could he appear here, only the Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clan is allowed to come in here, he is a half-step Eternal Realm!"

"No, he beheaded his own cultivation, and he is now in the Sixfold Realm!"

"Run away, even the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor of the Sixfold Realm is far from something we can deal with!"

A large number of Supreme Beings are fleeing, but the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor is not chasing and killing, because protecting the innate eternal life is the most important thing!

It was at this time that the innate eternal life was officially born.

And Ye Tian also approached here for the first time, and urged the copying talent.
